rulings.Case Title: LEILANI RANDOLPH VS. U.S. BANK N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-12-640409 WITH CASE CGC-11-516813
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 21, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFF LEILANI RANDOLPH's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-12-640409 WITH CASE CGC-11-516813. Deny not within limited set of exemption to general rule on consolidation of unlawful detainer actions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NANCY TAN VS. SHIRLEY TENE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 21, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT SHIRLEY TENE's AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule five days to answer. Plaintiff does have standing to bring action; Mr. Stadler's verification of complaint is appropriate. = (501/REQ)
